title: Jack Black minecraft song over Wet Hands
description: Replaces Wet Hands with the Jack Black meme edit of it
body:
[Original audio](https://x.com/RainingKetchup/status/1764787009032208491) by RainingKetchup on Twitter

Replaces Wet Hands to be a meme edit of Jack Black singing over it

Due to the way that music formatting was changed in 1.21, there are two different versions you can use - the <1.20 version should work for other past versions as well
